title: IVR - KCR Modern Sign Pack
description: IVR - Modern Sign Pack, contains KCRC Modern Sign Model and Over 250 Symbols for Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) Mod
body:
![Sign Pack Content](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db50866230f7ce9e5d7e34049d35f6f3eddc0f1c.png)

**Overview**
--- This pack main features KCR style Signs, providing **300+** symbols in this pack.
Feel free to join the Discord to **Provide reference materials** for adding KCR Realistic Symbol! **Before Download 下載須知**
